scripts.setup:vendor: mkdir -p assets/vendor/js && cp ../../deps/phoenix/priv/static/phoenix.mjs assets/vendor/js/phoenix.js && cp ../../deps/phoenix_html/priv/static/phoenix_html.js assets/vendor/js/ && cp ../../deps/phoenix_live_view/priv/static/phoenix_live_view.esm.js assets/vendor/js/phoenix_live_view.js
scripts.build: bun run setup:vendor && bun build assets/js/app.js --outdir=priv/static/assets --target=browser --format=esm
scripts.build:deploy: bun run setup:vendor && bun build assets/js/app.js --outdir=priv/static/assets --target=browser --format=esm --minify
scripts.dev: bun run setup:vendor && bun build assets/js/app.js --outdir=priv/static/assets --target=browser --format=esm --watch
